rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" draws the reading toward purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Sun (31), so energy and confidence support forward movement is already in play. Sun colors your calling through confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. Present turns on Snake (7), bringing strategy and layered motives shape outcomes to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Here, Snake emphasizes mixed motives, inner conflict, or layered pressure that can make a true path harder to read cleanly. The likely direction shows in Future through Letter (27), and it suggests written clarity improves confidence once the pivot is met directly.
